sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash_table (id UInt32, value String, hash_value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_hash_table (id, value, hash_value) VALUES (1, 'example', farmHash64('example'));
UPDATE test_hash_table SET hash_value = farmHash64(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, hash_value FROM test_hash_table WHERE hash_value = farmHash64('example');
SELECT farmHash64(array(toString(id), value), 'constant', 42) AS FarmHash FROM test_hash_table;
